assertions.description: The schematic has 4 MIPI DSI data lanes with named net pairs DATAP0/DATAN0, DATAP1/DATAN1, DATAP2/DATAN2, DATAP3/DATAN3, but the differential pair detector only identified CLK_P/CLK_N. All four data lane pairs share the same naming convention (_P/_N suffix) used to detect the clock pair and should have been detected.
